column1: FLOOD RISK | These numbers change with every update, but this gives us a general idea of the 4-8" rain forecast we have moving forward, with a few spots seeing a bit more or a bit less. With a tropical system, it's all about the bands and where they set up. Heaviest totals will be in our coastal counties, with lowest totals inland.
